title: sunantilambanomai #4878
definition:
1) to lay hold along with, to strive to obtain with others,
    help in obtaining
 2) to take hold with another
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to lay hold along with, to strive to obtain with others,
    help in obtaining
 2) to take hold with another

    NASB:  to take hold with at the side, hence to take a share in, generally  to help:
